basic_details.job_title: TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Skill Training Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 15 July 2026 on the official website https://www.tiss.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Management, Education, Skill Development, or related field
qualification.details: Skill Training Manager: Master’s Degree in Management, Education, Skill Development, or related field with minimum 5 to 6 years of experience in training coordination, learning & development, skill development, or capacity-building programmes

salary_details.details: Skill Training Manager: INR 50,000 - 55,000 per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Skill Training Manager Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TISS Skill Training Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Skill Training Manager: Master’s Degree in Management, Education, Skill Development, or related field with minimum 5 to 6 years of experience in training coordination, learning & development, skill development, or capacity-building programmes

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Skill Training Manager: INR 50,000 - 55,000 per month

rows.event: Last Date of Filling of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the TISS Skill Training Manager post is 02 August 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Skill Training Manager posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Skill Training Manager position in the Tata Institute of Social Sciences Recruitment 2026. This is a contract-based government job opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for TISS Skill Training Manager jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for the TISS Skill Training Manager recruitment is online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the direct link provided to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Skill Training Manager position at TISS?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Skill Training Manager position will receive a salary ranging from INR 50,000 to INR 55,000 per month, as per the official notification details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for Skill Training Manager?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s Degree in Management, Education, Skill Development, or a related field with 5-6 years of relevant experience to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General and OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs 500/- for the TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026. The fee can be paid online.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for women candidates?
faq.answer: No, women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for the TISS Skill Training Manager Recruitment 2026. Their application fee is Nil.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Skill Training Manager position at TISS primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the Skill Training Manager post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Skill Training Manager position is Mumbai, Maharashtra. The Tata Institute of Social Sciences is located in Mumbai, pincode 400088.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of TISS?
faq.answer: The official website for the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is www.tiss.edu. Candidates can visit this website for more details and to apply online for the recruitment.
